name: keel
description: Complete AI-SDLC pipeline for Claude Code. 8 autonomous agents: Brainstorm → Requirements → Design → TDD → QA → Security → Deploy. Go from idea to production in 2 hours.

commands.title: Keel: Initialize Project
commands.description: Scaffold a new project or add Keel to an existing one

commands.title: Keel: Brainstorm
commands.description: Generate feature ideas from a business goal

commands.title: Keel: Requirements
commands.description: Create BDD requirements and acceptance criteria

commands.title: Keel: Design
commands.description: Generate system architecture and database schema

commands.title: Keel: TDD Green
commands.description: Write code to pass tests (TDD Green phase)

commands.title: Keel: TDD Refactor
commands.description: Refactor code while keeping tests green

commands.title: Keel: Test
commands.description: Run comprehensive test suite with coverage

commands.title: Keel: Deploy
commands.description: Deploy with canary, blue-green, or instant rollout
